mapper.sql: id, user_id, course_name, course_type, credits, semester, academic_year, score, grade_point, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO courses (user_id, course_name, course_type, credits, semester, academic_year, score, grade_point) VALUES (#{userId}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{credits}, #{semester}, #{academicYear}, #{score}, #{gradePoint})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM courses WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
